memory.summary: Lunch with cohort_3 looks tempting, but I need to finish my assignment analysis first to get it done.

desires: Finish the assignment analysis immediately to secure a perfect grade and avoid any risk of looking unreliable.
Avoid the social friction of saying 'no' to cohort_3's lunch invitation, but do it quickly so I can get back to work.
Ignore my sleep debt and stress for now because finishing the task feels more urgent than feeling tired later.

goals.description: Finish the assignment analysis immediately to secure a perfect grade and avoid looking unreliable.
goals.rationale: My 'achievement' value (0.5) dominates; I need the grade now. My 'impulsive' nature means I can't wait, and 'avoidant' traits mean I fear being seen as lazy or unreliable if I delay.

goals.description: Accept cohort_3's lunch invitation but keep it strictly to 60 minutes to minimize social friction while protecting work time.
goals.rationale: I have low assertiveness (3) and an 'avoidant' conflict style, so saying 'no' feels too risky socially. However, my 'impulsive' short planning horizon makes me want to get it over with quickly rather than plan a long break.

goals.description: Ignore sleep debt and stress until after the reading is done.
goals.rationale: My 'sleep_discipline' is low (3) and 'procrastination_bias' is high (7). I am currently discounting future health consequences (stress/sleep debt) in favor of immediate task completion, which fits my 'impulsive' profile.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (assignment) and g2 (lunch) by accepting the invite but capping it to protect my work time. Avoids social friction (avoidant trait) while prioritizing the immediate grade over future health consequences (impulsive).
